title: n8n node only retrieves non-active workflows
symptom: The n8n node is only pulling a subset of workflows, specifically non-active ones, leading to missing workflows during backup.
applies_when: Using the n8n node to retrieve workflows
not_this_if: No filters are applied in the node settings
root_cause: The n8n node has a filter option that defaults to only returning non-active workflows. This behavior can lead to confusion when users expect to retrieve all workflows regardless of their active status.
fix_steps: Remove or adjust the filter to include active workflows
Save the changes and run the node again
agent_instruction: Adjust the filter settings in the n8n node to include active workflows.
